title: frontend: CreateResourceForm: Tolerate partial YAML in container field
author: WasThatRudy

findings.description: safeValue computed inline on every render; when value is non-array, [] is a new reference each render. Stable in practice (length always 0), but consider useMemo if this pattern is reused.
Inline normalization handles null, primitives, and nested arrays — all three crash-inducing js-yaml intermediate shapes documented in the PR.
getPort uses container?.containerPort optional chaining, closing a second null-dereference path.
vi.mock for lib/k8s/namespace correctly avoids circular barrel import; documented with a clear comment.
